project_owner_authorization.statement_summary: All members were consulted and are inactive; the project owner authorized any operation needed to repair the GPU path and requested prompt completion.
interpreted_scope: install a persistent NVIDIA GPU UUID exclusion configuration
gracefully terminate the single verified resumable curl transfer immediately before reboot while preserving its .part and .meta files
verify the exact four-GPU runtime after reboot
project_owner_authorization.password_handling: The host account owner enters the sudo password directly into a visible remote TTY; the password is not read or recorded by Codex.

reason_for_reboot_path.kernel_event: NVRM reported a non-zero usage count while removing 0000:50:00.0.
reason_for_reboot_path.stuck_operation: The NVIDIA sysfs unbind callback did not return after its driver symlink disappeared; one SIGINT remained pending and no safe in-band resume was possible.
prohibited_recovery_actions: SIGKILL of the stuck root process
manual rebind of the two faulting GPUs

known_reboot_impact.status: The partial file is preserved, but its signed URL cannot be safely recovered; resumption requires a refreshed URL after reboot.
